subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto them that dwell within the realm of possibility, that He may draw them nigh unto the Kingdom of My Name, the All-Merciful - the station which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن فی الامکان لیقربهم الی ملکوت اسمی الرحمن المقام الذی
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
